verses.dev: अहं रुद्रेभिर्वसुभिश्चरामि । अहमादित्यैरुत विश्वदेवैः । अहं मित्रावरुणोभा बिभर्मि । अहमिन्द्राग्नी अहमश्विनोभा ॥

devWords.alignedIASTUnderlying: rudrebhir vasubhiś carāmi aham ādityair uta viśvadevaiḥ
devWords.underlyingDevText: रुद्रेभिर वसुभिश चरामि अहम आदित्यैर उत विश्वदेवैः

verses.eng: I move with the Rudras and the Vasus, I wander with the Ādityas and all the Gods. I bear Mitra and Varuṇa, both, I bear Indra and Agni, I bear the Aśvins both.
verses.iast: ahaṃ rudrebhir vasubhiś carāmi । aham ādityair uta viśvadevaiḥ । ahaṃ mitrāvaruṇobhā bibharmi । aham indrāgnī aham aśvinobhā ॥

sandhi.notes: Both sides of the boundary are consonantal.

verses.dev: अहं सोममाहनसं बिभर्मि । अहं त्वष्टारमुत पूषणं भगम् । अहं दधामि द्रविणं हविष्मते । सुप्राव्ये यजमानाय सुन्वते ॥
verses.eng: I bear the pressed Soma, I bear Tvaṣṭṛ, Pūṣan, and Bhaga. I bestow wealth upon the offerer of oblation, upon the sacrificer who presses Soma.
verses.iast: ahaṃ somam āhanasaṃ bibharmi । ahaṃ tvaṣṭāram uta pūṣaṇaṃ bhagam । ahaṃ dadhāmi draviṇaṃ haviṣmate । suprāvye yajamānāya sunvate ॥

sandhi.notes: Surface token aligns with multiple underlying words.
Both sides of the boundary are consonantal.

verses.dev: अहं राष्ट्री संगमनी वसूनाम् । चिकितुषी प्रथमायज्ञियानाम् । तां मा देवा व्यदधुः पुरुत्रा । भूरिस्थात्रां भूर्यावेशयन्तीम् ॥
verses.eng: I am the Queen, the gatherer of treasures, knowing, the first of those worthy of worship. The Gods have distributed me in many places, making me abide in many homes.
verses.iast: ahaṃ rāṣṭrī saṃgamanī vasūnām । cikitūṣī prathamā yajñiyānām । tāṃ mā devā vyadadhuḥ purutrā । bhūristhātrāṃ bhūry āveśayantīm ॥

sandhi.notes: Both sides of the boundary are consonantal.

verses.dev: मया सोऽन्नमत्ति यो विपश्यति । यः प्राणिति य ईं शृणोत्युक्तम् । अमन्तवो मां त उप क्षियन्ति । श्रुधि श्रुत श्रद्धिवं ते वदामि ॥
verses.eng: Through me alone all eat the food that feeds them, each man who sees, breathes, and hears the spoken word. They know it not, yet they dwell beside me. Hear, thou who hearest, I tell thee what is worthy of belief.
verses.iast: mayā so ’nnam atti yo vipaśyati । yaḥ prāṇiti ya īṃ śṛṇoty uktam । amantavo māṃ ta upa kṣiyanti । śrudhi śruta śraddhivaṃ te vadāmi ॥

verses.dev: अहमेव स्वयमिदं वदामि । जुष्टं देवेभिरुत मानुषेभिः । यं कामये तं तमुग्रं करोमि । तं ब्रह्माणं तं ऋषिं तं सुमेधाम् ॥
verses.eng: I, verily, myself declare this which Gods and men alike shall welcome. I make him whom I love mighty; I make him a priest, a seer, a wise man.
verses.iast: aham eva svayam idaṃ vadāmi । juṣṭaṃ devebhir uta mānuṣebhiḥ । yaṃ kāmaye taṃ tam ugraṃ kṛṇomi । taṃ brahmāṇaṃ taṃ ṛṣiṃ taṃ sumedhām ॥

verses.dev: अहं रुद्राय धनुरातनोमि । ब्रह्मद्विषे शरवे हन्तवा उ । अहं जनाय समदं कृणोमि । अहं द्यावापृथिवी आविवेश ॥
verses.eng: I bend the bow for Rudra, that his arrow may strike and slay the hater of devotion. I rouse and order battle for the people, I have entered Heaven and Earth.
verses.iast: ahaṃ rudrāya dhanur ā tanomi । brahmadviṣe śarave hantavā u । ahaṃ janāya samadaṃ kṛṇomi । ahaṃ dyāvāpṛthivī ā viveśa ॥

verses.dev: अहं सुवे पितरमस्य मूर्धन् । मम योनिरप्स्वन्तः समुद्रे । ततो वि तिष्ठे भुवनानु विश्वा । उतामूं द्यां वर्ष्मणोप स्पृशामि ॥
verses.eng: I bring forth the Father on the head of this world. My origin is in the waters, in the ocean. Thence I extend over all beings; even to yonder heaven I reach with my body.
verses.iast: ahaṃ suve pitaram asya mūrdhan । mama yonir apsv antaḥ samudre । tato vi tiṣṭhe bhuvanānu viśvā । utāmūṃ dyāṃ varṣmaṇopa spṛśāmi ॥

verses.dev: अहमेव वात इव प्रवामि । आरभमाणा भुवनानि विश्वा । परो दिवा पर एना पृथिव्या । एतावती महिना सं बभूव ॥
verses.eng: I blow like the wind, setting all the worlds in motion. I transcend the heaven and this earth; so vast am I in my greatness.
verses.iast: aham eva vāta iva pravāmi । ārabhamāṇā bhuvanāni viśvā । paro divā para enā pṛthivyā । etāvatī mahinā saṃ babhūva ॥
